## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration or full-time opportunity between Konstantine and Marcel's company, growthx.ai.](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Konstantine shared his extensive experience in SEO, data analysis, and SaaS growth strategies](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [Marcel expressed interest but needs more two-way conversation; suggested a follow-up call with Jason (VP of GoToMarket)](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1322.0)
  - [growthx.ai has 70 employees and is being selective about new hires, but open to opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1333.0)

## Topics

### Konstantine's Background and Expertise

  - [Transformed mindset in 2014, applying learning principles to career growth](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=147.0)
  - [Worked with Email Template Builder (Camelon.io), growing to 7-figure business](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Developed SEO fundamentals focusing on relevancy, growing traffic to 70k-100k visitors](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=323.0)
  - [Freelance consulting since 2018, working with companies from $3M to $50M in size](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=348.0)
  - [Created comprehensive data analysis frameworks for SEO, content, and sales funnels](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)

### Konstantine's Analytical Approach

  - [Blends various data sources: crawling data, publishing dates, content optimization scores](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=618.0)
  - [Maps content to features for SaaS companies, focusing on use cases that drive sales](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=747.0)
  - [Utilizes custom tools for competitor analysis, keyword clustering, and intent mapping](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Emphasizes connecting SEO efforts directly to sales and conversions](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=432.0)

### Marcel's Company (growthx.ai) Status

  - [Currently at 70 employees](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Being opportunistic about new hires due to being fully staffed](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1337.0)
  - [Open to exploring opportunities with the right fit](https://fathom.video/share/5K1okYVrXgMRA9xZ-1nSzG4dNgNCHZKZ?tab=summary&timestamp=1361.0)
